subject: [PATCH pynfs v2 11/25] server41tests: test unrequested notification type triggers recall

2026-04-16.patch_summary: This patch adds a test to the server41tests suite to verify that when an unrequested notification type is triggered, the server issues a CB_RECALL instead of a CB_NOTIFY. The test creates a directory delegation and requests only REMOVE notifications, then triggers an ADD event from a second client. It checks that the server responds with a CB_RECALL in this scenario.
